title: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro
summary: Google DeepMind introduced Lyria 3 Pro, an advanced music generation model that enables creation of custom tracks up to 3 minutes long with customization and creative control. The tool is being integrated into additional Google products beyond the initial Lyria 3 release.
